response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:00: Song 'You & 合図' by Otonose Kanade identified via on-screen text. Performed by Otonose Kanade herself. 2. 02:00-05:00: Talk segment identified, no vocal music. 3. Lyrics lookup for 'You & 合図' did not return results (likely an original song being announced/released). Transcribed lyrics directly from the on-screen video subtitles for accuracy.
response.global_summary: A performance video of the song 'You & 合図' (You and Aizu) by the VTuber Otonose Kanade, followed by a talk segment promoting her birthday merchandise.

scenes.description: Otonose Kanade performs her original song 'You & 合図' with two background dancers. Lyrics are displayed on-screen.

scenes.description: Otonose Kanade talks directly to the camera, promoting her birthday merchandise. No vocal music is playing.
